title: Freshly Sauteed Moroccan Cabbage Stir-fry
description: A fresh and crisp lazy-sunday moroccan dish featuring white cabbage, sauteed to perfection with aromatic spices without any nuts.

ingredients.name: Tomato Sauce
ingredients.notes: Heated and reduced to add a touch of sweetness

ingredients.name: Coriander Powder
ingredients.notes: For its bright yellow color and aromatic notes

ingredients.name: Turmeric Powder
ingredients.notes: To enhance the natural flavors of the dish

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes
ingredients.notes: For a slight kick of heat, optional

instructions: Shred the cabbage into thin strips and set aside.
Toast the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add garlic and onion and sauté for an additional 3-5 minutes until softened.
Add shredded cabbage to the skillet and sprinkle with cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, and red pepper flakes (if using). Stir well to coat the cabbage evenly.
Pour in the tomato sauce over the cabbage. Add salt to taste and stir again to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
Cover the skillet with a lid or aluminum foil for about 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Remove from heat and serve garnished with fresh parsley, if desired.
